users_email_idx.name: users_email_idx
users_email_idx.where: "users"."email" IS NOT NULL AND "users"."deletedAt" IS NULL

users_phone_idx.name: users_phone_idx
users_phone_idx.where: "users"."phone" IS NOT NULL AND "users"."deletedAt" IS NULL

users_google_id_idx.name: users_google_id_idx
users_google_id_idx.where: "users"."googleId" IS NOT NULL AND "users"."deletedAt" IS NULL
